description_long: This is a dark-colored, boxy utility truck with a robust, armored appearance, featuring a large rectangular cargo compartment and a cab with flat, vertical windows. The sides of the truck display prominent Cyrillic lettering and double-headed eagle emblems, suggesting official or governmental use, possibly for security or law enforcement. The front of the truck has a grille, headlights, and a license plate, while the rear is equipped with double doors secured by visible locking mechanisms and additional lights. The vehicle rides on four solid wheels with black fenders, and side mirrors extend from the cab for enhanced visibility. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on function and security. The truck's matte finish and reinforced structure indicate it is built for durability and urban operations.
description: A matte black, boxy security or law enforcement truck with Cyrillic emblems, reinforced cargo compartment, and secure rear doors.
description_view_0: Front view shows the flat windshield, grille, headlights, license plate, and side mirrors.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the Cyrillic lettering, double-headed eagle emblem, side door, and two wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the double cargo doors with locking mechanisms, rear lights, and license plate.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, with Cyrillic text, emblem, side door, and two wheels.
